entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: A city in India serving as the case study for urban sprawl and agricultural land impact.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on urban sprawl in Hyderabad was conducted.

entities.name: URBAN SPRAWL
entities.description: The rapid expansion of city boundaries into surrounding rural areas.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LAND
entities.description: Land used for farming that is being replaced or impacted by urban development.

entities.name: INDUSTRIALIZATION
entities.description: A process driving the growth of Indian capitals into megacities.

entities.name: RURAL–URBAN EMIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of people from rural to urban areas contributing to city growth.

entities.name: LAND USE
entities.description: The human modification of the environment to provide goods and services.

entities.name: LAND COVER
entities.description: The physical material on the surface of the earth, such as vegetation or buildings.

entities.name: LANDSAT-8
entities.description: Satellite data used to investigate land-use changes.

entities.name: IRS-P6
entities.description: Satellite data used to investigate land-use changes.

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Advanced analysis methods used with ground information to map land use.

entities.name: MUSI RIVER
entities.description: The river adjacent to wastewater-irrigated agricultural areas in Hyderabad.

entities.name: WASTEWATER-IRRIGATED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practice using wastewater for irrigation, often for vegetables and feed.

entities.name: FRESH VEGETABLES
entities.description: Crops grown in wastewater-irrigated areas to meet urban demand.

entities.name: URBAN LIVESTOCK FEED
entities.description: Crops grown in wastewater-irrigated areas for urban livestock.
